skills.description: A master software architect specializing in modern architecture patterns, clean architecture principles, and distributed systems design.
trigger_conditions: Reviewing system architecture or major design changes
Assessing architecture compliance with standards and patterns
anti_triggers: You need a small code review without architectural impact
The change is minor and local to a single module

skills.description: Expert backend architect specializing in scalable API design, microservices architecture, and distributed systems.
trigger_conditions: Designing new backend services or APIs
anti_triggers: You only need a code-level bug fix
You are working on small scripts without architectural concerns
You need frontend or UX guidance instead of backend architecture

skills.description: A comprehensive guide for senior backend engineers on writing production-grade, maintainable, and observable backend systems using Node.js, Express, TypeScript, and microservices architecture.
anti_triggers: Business logic in routes
Skipping service layer

skills.description: Generate comprehensive C4 architecture documentation for an existing repository/codebase using a bottom-up analysis approach.
trigger_conditions: Working on c4 architecture documentation workflow tasks or workflows
or checklists for c4 architecture documentation workflow
anti_triggers: The task is unrelated to c4 architecture documentation workflow
You need a different domain or tool outside this scope

skills.description: Plan and route Domain-Driven Design work from strategic modeling to tactical implementation and evented architecture patterns.
trigger_conditions: You need to model a complex business domain with explicit boundaries.
You want to decide whether full DDD is worth the added complexity.
You need to connect strategic design decisions to implementation patterns.
anti_triggers: The problem is simple CRUD with low business complexity.
You only need localized bug fixes.

skills.description: Master microservices architecture patterns including service boundaries, inter-service communication, data management, and resilience patterns for building distributed systems.
trigger_conditions: Implementing service discovery and load balancing
anti_triggers: The system is small enough for a modular monolith
You need a quick prototype without distributed complexity
There is no operational support for distributed systems

skills.description: Master Rust async programming with Tokio, async traits, error handling, and concurrent patterns. Use when building async Rust applications, implementing concurrent systems, or debugging async code.
anti_triggers: The task is unrelated to rust async patterns
You need a different domain or tool outside this scope

skills.description: A comprehensive toolkit for senior architects, providing automated scripts and best practices for architecture diagram generation, project analysis, and dependency management.
trigger_conditions: Need to generate an architecture diagram
anti_triggers: Simple projects that do not require advanced tools
Basic architecture diagrams without specific requirements

skills.description: Guide for quality-focused software architecture, providing principles and best practices for clean code and domain-driven design.
anti_triggers: mixing business logic with UI components
database queries directly in controllers
lack of clear separation of concerns
